summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink PWA referral and commission system completed. All features working correctly: user registration with referral code generation, 2-level unilevel compensation (3% L1, 1% L2), Diamond Leader status tracking, orphan queue with non-verified user support, withdrawal with ID verification requirement. Backend: 25/25 tests passed. Frontend: Earnings Dashboard and Withdraw pages load correctly with all data displayed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/referral-system/my-network - Returns network data (L1/L2 counts, referral code, members list)
Backend: GET /api/referral-system/stats - Returns detailed referral statistics with commission rates
Backend: Unauthorized access to /api/referral-system/my-network returns 401
Backend: GET /api/commissions/my-commissions - Returns commission history with totals (pending/paid/total)
Backend: GET /api/commissions/pending - Returns pending commissions with count
Backend: GET /api/diamond/status - Returns Diamond Leader progress (recruits, commissions, sales)
Backend: POST /api/diamond/check-qualification - Checks qualification status
Backend: GET /api/withdrawals/eligibility - Returns eligibility (1% fee, $10 min, ID verification required)
Backend: GET /api/withdrawals/history - Returns withdrawal history
Backend: GET /api/withdrawals/verify-id/status - Returns ID verification status
Backend: GET /api/orphans/queue-status - Returns orphan queue status with eligibility details
Backend: POST /api/orphans/join-queue - Allows users to join orphan queue (non-verified with priority message)
Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard - Returns admin stats (requires admin)
Backend: GET /api/admin/withdrawals/pending - Returns pending withdrawals (requires admin)
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics - Returns 30-day analytics (requires admin)
Backend: GET /api/health - Health check returns 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns API info
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user with unique 8-char referral code
Backend: POST /api/auth/register with referral_code - Sets referred_by correctly
Backend: Orphan assignment on registration - New users without referral code get assigned to queue members
Backend: Commission rates validation - Regular users get 3% L1, 1% L2
Backend: Diamond benefits validation - $100 bonus, 4% L1, 2% L2, 2% platform
Backend: Withdrawal request without ID verification returns 400
Frontend: Earnings Dashboard loads with all sections (Total Earned, Pending, Referral Code, Network Stats, Diamond Leader Status)
Frontend: Earnings Dashboard shows correct commission rates (3% L1, 1% L2)
Frontend: Earnings Dashboard shows Diamond Leader requirements (100 recruits, $1000 commissions, $1000 sales)
Frontend: Earnings Dashboard shows Diamond Benefits ($100 bonus, 4% L1, 2% L2, 2% platform)
Frontend: Earnings Dashboard shows Recent Level 1 Members list
Frontend: Withdraw page loads with Available Balance and ID Verification Required
Frontend: Withdraw page shows Verify My Identity button
Frontend: Withdraw page shows View Withdrawal History button
critical_code_review_comments: All referral system APIs are properly implemented and return correct data structures
Commission rates correctly configured: L1=3%, L2=1%, Platform=4% (Diamond: L1=4%, L2=2%, Platform=2%)
Diamond Leader requirements correctly set: 100 recruits, $1000 downline commissions, $1000 personal sales in 30 days
Diamond Leader benefits correctly displayed: $100 bonus, 4% L1, 2% L2, 2% platform
Withdrawal fee correctly set at 1% with $10 minimum
ID verification required for withdrawals - correctly enforced
Orphan queue allows non-verified users to join with priority message about ID verification
Orphan assignment on registration works - new users without referral code get assigned to queue members
Admin endpoints properly protected with is_admin check (returns 403 for non-admins)
Frontend pages properly integrate with backend APIs
Commission processing integrated into media_sales.py complete_transfer function

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly, all features working)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during registration tests (test_reg_*, test_ref_*, test_orphan_*, test_queue_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system fully tested and working. All endpoints verified: /api/referral-system/my-network, /api/referral-system/stats, /api/commissions/my-commissions, /api/commissions/pending, /api/diamond/status, /api/diamond/check-qualification, /api/withdrawals/eligibility, /api/withdrawals/history, /api/withdrawals/verify-id/status, /api/orphans/queue-status, /api/orphans/join-queue, /api/admin/dashboard, /api/admin/withdrawals/pending, /api/admin/analytics. Frontend pages: /earnings, /withdraw all working. Test user test@test.com is an admin. Stripe Identity integration for ID verification exists but requires actual Stripe setup to test fully.
